name: Potato Pups
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the hot dogs in half lengthwise, stopping just short of being completely split open.
2. Fill each opening with a mixture of mashed potatoes and dry mustard.
3. Sprinkle the top of each pup with paprika.
4. Bake in an oven set to 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about 15 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
5. Optionally, sprinkle grated cheese (cheddar or parmesan) over the top before serving.
6. Serve as a quick lunch or dinner option that kids love. Many find these tasty regularly, even after growing up.
